mapper.sql: id, title, task_number, training_type, task_type, prompt, image_description, model_answer, band_score_note, key_phrases, difficulty, topic_tags, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select:
SELECT wt.*, sr.status AS study_status FROM ielts_writing_tasks wt LEFT JOIN ielts_study_records sr ON sr.content_type = 'WRITING' AND sr.content_id = wt.id
ORDER BY wt.task_number, wt.created_at DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ielts_writing_tasks wt LEFT JOIN ielts_study_records sr ON sr.content_type = 'WRITING' AND sr.content_id = wt.id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ielts_writing_tasks (id, title, task_number, training_type, task_type, prompt, image_description, model_answer, band_score_note, key_phrases, difficulty, topic_tags, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{id,jdbcType=OTHER}, #{title}, #{taskNumber}, #{trainingType}, #{taskType}, #{prompt}, #{imageDescription}, #{modelAnswer}, #{bandScoreNote}, #{keyPhrases}, #{difficulty}, #{topicTags}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE ielts_writing_tasks SET title = #{title}, task_number = #{taskNumber}, training_type = #{trainingType}, task_type = #{taskType}, prompt = #{prompt}, image_description = #{imageDescription}, model_answer = #{modelAnswer}, band_score_note = #{bandScoreNote}, key_phrases = #{keyPhrases}, difficulty = #{difficulty}, topic_tags = #{topicTags}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id,jdbcType=OTHER}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO ielts_writing_tasks (id, title, task_number, training_type, task_type, prompt, image_description, model_answer, band_score_note, key_phrases, difficulty, topic_tags, created_at, updated_at) VALUES
(#{t.id,jdbcType=OTHER}, #{t.title}, #{t.taskNumber}, #{t.trainingType}, #{t.taskType}, #{t.prompt}, #{t.imageDescription}, #{t.modelAnswer}, #{t.bandScoreNote}, #{t.keyPhrases}, #{t.difficulty}, #{t.topicTags}, #{t.createdAt}, #{t.updatedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT wt.* FROM ielts_writing_tasks wt WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM ielts_study_records sr WHERE sr.content_type = 'WRITING' AND sr.content_id = wt.id ) ORDER BY wt.difficulty, wt.id LIMIT #{limit}
